## Runtime.ChocolateLibrary.getRecipe() method

Gets a [recipe](./ts-chocolate.recipes.recipe.md) by its [composite ID](./ts-chocolate.recipeid.md)

**Signature:**

```typescript
getRecipe(id: RecipeId): Result<IRecipe>;
```
